props.heading: Terms of Service
props.description: These terms explain how to use Harmony Hope Foundation’s digital services responsibly and respectfully.

props.heading: Terms at a Glance
props.description: Simple principles for safe and constructive participation.

features.title: Use means acceptance
features.description: By using our services, you agree to these terms.

features.title: Respectful conduct
features.description: Use our platforms lawfully and in ways that protect others’ dignity and safety.

features.title: Account responsibility
features.description: If you create an account, keep credentials secure and information accurate.

features.title: Fair limitations
features.description: Services are provided as available, with legal limits as permitted by law.

props.heading: 1) Acceptance
props.body:
These Terms govern access to Harmony Hope Foundation websites, forms, and related digital services.

If you do not agree, please discontinue use.

props.heading: 2) Eligibility
props.body:
You must be at least 13 years old, or the legal minimum age in your jurisdiction, to use these services.

Users under 18 should use the services with parent or guardian permission.

props.heading: 3) Acceptable Use
props.body:
You agree to use the services in lawful, respectful ways and not to misuse, disrupt, scrape, or attempt unauthorized access to systems.

You may not use the services to harm others, spread abuse, or misrepresent the Foundation.

props.heading: 4) Content and Intellectual Property
props.body:
Unless otherwise noted, site content and branding belong to Harmony Hope Foundation or its licensors.

You may view and share content for personal, educational, or nonprofit-support purposes, but not in ways that imply false endorsement.

props.heading: 5) Third-Party Services
props.body:
Some features may rely on third-party services (for example payment, analytics, or communications tools).

Your use of third-party services is subject to their own terms and privacy practices.

props.heading: 6) Service Availability
props.body:
We aim for reliable service but cannot guarantee uninterrupted access at all times.

We may modify, suspend, or discontinue features when necessary.

props.heading: 7) Disclaimers and Liability
props.body:
Services are provided on an “as is” and “as available” basis.

To the extent allowed by law, we disclaim implied warranties and limit liability for indirect or consequential damages arising from use of the services.

props.heading: 8) Changes to Terms
props.body: We may update these Terms as our services evolve. Continued use after updates indicates acceptance of the revised Terms.

props.heading: Questions about these terms?
props.description: Our team is available to help clarify policy and participation requirements.

props.copyright: © 2026 Harmony Hope Foundation. All rights reserved.
